sourceOverview.notes: Ultra-fast LPU inference. Hosts Llama, Mixtral, Gemma, etc. STT: Whisper (free tier). No TTS.

Compound [groq/compound]

Hosted open models [dynamic] — Catalog changes frequently; includes Qwen, Kimi, OSS, etc.

audit.priceRangeSummary: TTS: ~$22/M chars for English Orpheus, ~$40/M chars for Arabic. STT billed per audio minute with free/dev limits. LLM pricing depends on hosted model.
audit.limitsSummary: TTS max ~200 chars/request. STT file limits: ~25 MB on free tier, ~100 MB on dev tier; larger audio via URL. Minimum STT billing ~10 sec.
audit.regionSummary: Groq-hosted cloud; regional granularity is more limited publicly than hyperscalers.
audit.ttsLanguagesSummary: English; Arabic (Saudi) on currently documented Orpheus models.
audit.appIntegrationNotes: Your sheet is outdated here: Groq now has public TTS in addition to LLM hosting and Whisper STT.

supplementalResearch.title: 4. Groq (US) — LLM ✓ TTS ✓ (preview) STT ✓
supplementalResearch.markdown:
### 4. Groq (US) — LLM ✓ TTS ✓ (preview) STT ✓

**Status:** Active. The designated **free default** provider. Base URL: `https://api.groq.com/openai/v1`

**LLM models:**

| Model ID | Input $/1M | Output $/1M | Context | Speed |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `llama-3.1-8b-instant` | $0.05 | $0.08 | 131K | 560 t/s |
| `llama-3.3-70b-versatile` | $0.59 | $0.79 | 131K | 280 t/s |
| `openai/gpt-oss-120b` | $0.15 | $0.60 | 131K | 500 t/s |
| `openai/gpt-oss-20b` | $0.075 | $0.30 | 131K | 1,000 t/s |
| `meta-llama/llama-4-scout-17b-16e-instruct` | $0.11 | $0.34 | 131K | 750 t/s (preview) |
| `moonshotai/kimi-k2-instruct-0905` | $1.00 | $3.00 | 262K | 200 t/s (preview) |
| `qwen/qwen3-32b` | $0.29 | $0.59 | 131K | 400 t/s (preview) |

Groq Compound (agentic system): `groq/compound`, `groq/compound-mini`.

**STT (Whisper on LPU):**

| Model ID | Pricing | Speed | Rate Limit |
|---|---|---|---|
| `whisper-large-v3` | **$0.111/hr** | 217–299× real-time | 200K ASH, 300 RPM |
| `whisper-large-v3-turbo` | **$0.04/hr** | 228–262× real-time | 400K ASH, 400 RPM |

57+ languages. Max file size: 100 MB (paid, via URL). Min billing: 10 seconds. OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

**TTS (Preview):**

| Model ID | Pricing | Language |
|---|---|---|
| `canopylabs/orpheus-v1-english` | $22/1M chars | English |
| `canopylabs/orpheus-arabic-saudi` | $40/1M chars | Arabic (Saudi) |

**Free tier:** No credit card required. Free API key from console.groq.com. Lower rate limits than paid. **This is the most important free tier for the app's default provider.**

**Paid tiers:** Developer (pay-as-you-go, 10× higher limits, 25% cost discounts). Enterprise (custom). Prompt caching: 50% off. Batch API: 50% off.

**Datacenters:** US (Dallas), Canada, Finland (Helsinki), Saudi Arabia. SOC 2, GDPR, HIPAA compliant.

**Integration notes:** Fully **OpenAI-compatible API**. Drop-in replacement — change base_url only. Official Python/JS SDK. Works with OpenAI SDK.

---
